summary: Static structural review of two-row Landing header refactor (no dotnet SDK; no runtime). All 9 acceptance criteria verified against Landing.cshtml lines 42-96 and landing.css lines 82-160.

verification_results.1_two_child_divs_in_nav: PASS — <nav.land-nav> contains .land-nav-brand-row (brand only) and .land-nav-inner (links + actions). Old single-row with brand inside .land-nav-inner is gone.
verification_results.2_brand_row_css_rule: PASS — .land-nav-brand-row at css lines 92-99: display:flex; justify-content:center; align-items:center; padding:0.9rem 1.5rem 0.4rem; max-width:1200px; margin:0 auto — exact match.
verification_results.3_brand_font_1_5rem: PASS — .land-nav-brand-row .land-brand { font-size: 1.5rem } at lines 100-102 (base .land-brand keeps 1.25rem at line 111 for footer usage).
verification_results.4_nav_inner_updated: PASS — .land-nav-inner (lines 104-108): padding:0 1.5rem 0.9rem (top removed); justify-content:space-between; display:flex; max-width:1200px; margin:0 auto.
verification_results.5_mobile_media_query: PASS — @media (max-width:768px) (lines 145-160) has all three: .land-nav-links{display:none}, .land-nav-brand-row padding 0.7rem 1rem 0.3rem + font-size 1.25rem, .land-nav-inner padding 0 1rem 0.7rem + justify-content:center + gap:0.5rem.
verification_results.6_no_changes_elsewhere: PASS — footer brand at Landing.cshtml line 678 uses plain .land-brand mb-3 (not wrapped in .land-nav-brand-row) — untouched, keeps 1.25rem font as required. Hero, pillars, pricing, footer structure intact.
verification_results.7_data_testids_preserved: PASS — verified: land-nav (L42), land-brand (L47), nav-how/compare/features/clinics/pricing (L53-57), land-signin (L88), land-getstarted (L91), land-lang-btn (L62).
verification_results.8_no_css_var_or_lang_dropdown_changes: PASS — :root vars unchanged; .land-lang* rules untouched; dropdown behavior identical.
verification_results.9_braces_balanced: PASS — Razor { } balanced 81/81 in Landing.cshtml; CSS { } balanced 325/325 in landing.css. No unclosed rules.

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: mobile media query comment says 'two remaining pills' (lang + sign-in) but 'Get Started' button also stays on mobile because .d-none.d-md-inline-flex hides it only on <md (Bootstrap md=768px, so at ≤768px it IS hidden — comment is accurate). No action needed.

Consider: .land-nav-brand-row and .land-nav-inner both define max-width:1200px + margin:0 auto separately — could be extracted into a shared rule, but current duplication is clear and low-cost. Non-blocking.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 = CSS/HTML-only two-row header refactor. User will visually verify in VS2026. Next iterations may require runtime testing once dotnet SDK is available in sandbox.
